zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强上行
zh.content:
6.94附近震荡上行，短线偏多但动能有限，呈窄幅整理上破尝试结构偏强，延续小级别反弹结构需关注突破6.95压力区确认信号谨慎追多

MACD微正且柱体放大有限，动能偏弱多头占优但未放量突破短线仍需观察量能配合否则易回踩均线支撑信号待确认阶段震荡为主关注成交量

下方支撑6.92与SMA20(6.87)，上方阻力6.95及7.02，多空分水岭明确短线区间震荡为主突破才改变结构关注结构未破坏

操作建议：回踩6.92附近轻仓试多，止损6.87下方，突破6.95可加仓顺势整体以趋势跟随为主，避免逆势重仓控制风险执行纪律稳健为先

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently in a tight consolidation phase with a mild bullish bias, trading just under recent intraday highs. Price action shows limited volatility, with candles clustering near 6.94. The market remains structurally stable above the 20-period SMA, suggesting buyers are gradually defending dips. Overall trend is sideways-to-slightly-upward rather than a strong directional move, reflecting equilibrium between supply and demand.

MACD is showing a modest positive reading at 0.0071, indicating weakening bearish pressure and a potential slow bullish crossover tendency in short-term momentum. Although RSI is not available, price behavior suggests a neutral-to-slightly-oversold recovery structure due to sustained holding above the 20-SMA. Momentum remains cautious but tilts mildly bullish as sellers fail to push price below recent lows range environment.

Immediate support is anchored around the 20-period SMA at 6.87025, which now acts as a dynamic floor for price stability. A secondary support zone lies near 6.85, with deeper protection around 6.80 if selling intensifies. On the upside, resistance is forming at 6.9451, the recent high, followed by a psychological barrier at 7.00. A breakout above this level could signal renewed bullish expansion in the near term.

For traders, the current environment favors range-bound strategies, buying near support around 6.87–6.85 and taking partial profits near 6.94 resistance. Breakout traders may wait for a decisive close above 7.00 before entering long positions with momentum confirmation. Risk management remains essential, with stops placed below 6.80 to avoid downside spikes. Overall bias is cautiously bullish but requires confirmation on breakout validation structure intact.
